parameters.jsonBody: ={{JSON.stringify({ mode: $json.body?.mode || $json.mode || 'public_web', input: { projectName: $json.body?.projectName || $json.projectName, industry: $json.body?.industry || $json.industry, category: $json.body?.category || $json.category, market: $json.body?.market || $json.market, researchGoal: $json.body?.researchGoal || $json.researchGoal, templateId: 'ecommerce_competitor_research', urls: Array.isArray($json.body?.urls) ? $json.body.urls : Array.isArray($json.urls) ? $json.urls : (($json.body?.urls || $json.urls) ? String($json.body?.urls || $json.urls).split('\n').filter(Boolean) : []), csvText: $json.body?.csvText || $json.csvText || '', manualText: $json.body?.manualText || $json.manualText || '' } })}}

={{JSON.stringify({ runId: $json.deliveryPackage?.runId || $json.result?.research_projects?.[0]?.id || $execution.id, status: 'completed', n8nExecutionId: $execution.id, deliveryPackageApiPath: '/api/industry-research/runs/' + ($json.deliveryPackage?.runId || $json.result?.research_projects?.[0]?.id || $execution.id) + '/download', message: 'n8n completed industry research run through the configured OpenAI-compatible provider.' })}}

meta.description: Production n8n intake for industry research. Calls the protected run API with n8n Header Auth credentials, then posts the completion callback.
